Sports.headline: Muzarabani PSL ban: PCB admits ‘no contract’ but stands firm on punishment
Sports.summary: The Pakistan Cricket Board has acknowledged that Blessing Muzarabani was not formally contracted for the PSL, yet upheld his two-year ban, citing a verbal agreement. Muzarabani's agent disputes this, arguing a contract is essential for an NOC, and deems the ban excessive, stemming from his choice to play in the IPL over the PSL.
key_points: PCB banned Blessing Muzarabani for two years from PSL.
PCB claims verbal agreement, Muzarabani's agent denies formal contract.
